---
title: "DA1_6302"
output: html_document
date: "2025-02-03"
---


## Reading in data

```{r}
# Read in the data (train and test)
realty2 <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\zaidb\\OneDrive - Southern Methodist University\\Fall 2024\\Classes\\STAT 6301 Experimental Stats\\Project\\train.csv")
realty_test <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\zaidb\\OneDrive - Southern Methodist University\\Fall 2024\\Classes\\STAT 6301 Experimental Stats\\Project\\test.csv")

```


```{r}
library(tidymodels)
library(caret)

# Ensure character columns are factors in both train and test sets
realty2 <- realty2 %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))

realty_test <- realty_test %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))


# Align factor levels in test_data to match those in train_data
for (col in names(realty2)) {
  if (is.factor(realty2[[col]])) {
    realty_test[[col]] <- factor(realty_test[[col]], levels = levels(realty2[[col]]))
  }
}

# Create the recipe not excluding nzv 
house_recipe_no_zv <- recipe(SalePrice ~., data = realty2) %>%
    step_rm(Utilities) %>%
    step_impute_knn(all_predictors()) %>%
    step_novel(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
    step_other(all_nominal_predictors(), threshold = 0.05) %>%
    step_mutate(
        MoSold = -1 * cos(0.523599 * MoSold),
        LotFrontage_LotArea = LotFrontage * LotArea,
        TotalBsmtSF_X1stFlrSF = TotalBsmtSF * X1stFlrSF,
        OverallQual_GarageCars = OverallQual * GarageCars,
        GrLivArea_TotRmsAbvGrd = GrLivArea * TotRmsAbvGrd,
        Total_Quality = OverallQual + OverallCond,
        Total_Bathrooms = FullBath + 0.5 * HalfBath + BsmtFullBath + 0.5 * BsmtHalfBath,
        MoSold_Fireplaces = MoSold * as.numeric(Fireplaces)
    ) %>%
  step_ns(GrLivArea, options = list(df = 5)) %>% # natural spline
    step_BoxCox(LotArea, LotFrontage_LotArea) %>%
    step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
    step_interact(terms = ~ OverallQual:GarageCars) %>%
    step_log(SalePrice, base = exp(1)) %>%
    step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

# Prepare the recipe
house_prep_no_zv <- prep(house_recipe_no_zv, training = realty2, retain = TRUE)  # retain = TRUE is crucial

# Extract the data
data_no_zv <- bake(house_prep_no_zv, new_data = realty2)

# Identify near-zero variance variables using nearZeroVar() from caret

nzv_vars <- nearZeroVar(data_no_zv, saveMetrics = TRUE)

# Print or inspect the results
print(nzv_vars)

# Filter to see only near-zero variance variables (optional)
nzv_vars_to_remove <- nzv_vars %>% filter(nzv == TRUE)
print(nzv_vars_to_remove)



#### NOW making recipe for training and test data INCLUDING step_zv
# Create the recipe
house_recipe <- recipe(SalePrice ~., data = realty2) %>%
    step_rm(Utilities) %>%
    step_impute_knn(all_predictors()) %>%
    step_novel(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
    step_other(all_nominal_predictors(), threshold = 0.05) %>%
    step_mutate(
        MoSold = -1 * cos(0.523599 * MoSold),
        LotFrontage_LotArea = LotFrontage * LotArea,
        TotalBsmtSF_X1stFlrSF = TotalBsmtSF * X1stFlrSF,
        OverallQual_GarageCars = OverallQual * GarageCars,
        GrLivArea_TotRmsAbvGrd = GrLivArea * TotRmsAbvGrd,
        Total_Quality = OverallQual + OverallCond,
        Total_Bathrooms = FullBath + 0.5 * HalfBath + BsmtFullBath + 0.5 * BsmtHalfBath,
        MoSold_Fireplaces = MoSold * as.numeric(Fireplaces)
    ) %>%
  step_ns(GrLivArea, options = list(df = 5)) %>% # natural spline
    step_BoxCox(LotArea, LotFrontage_LotArea) %>%
    step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
    step_interact(terms = ~ OverallQual:GarageCars) %>%
    step_zv(all_predictors()) %>%
    step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

# Apply log transformation only to the training data
house_recipe2 <- house_recipe %>%
    step_log(SalePrice, base = exp(1))

# Prepare the recipe for realty2
house_prep2 <- prep(house_recipe2, training = realty2)

# Prepare the recipe for realty_test
house_prep <- prep(house_recipe, training = realty2)

# Apply the recipe to training and test data + actual test data
train_processed <- bake(house_prep2, new_data = realty2)
test_processed <- bake(house_prep, new_data = realty_test)


# Define cross-validation folds
cv_folds <- vfold_cv(train_processed, v = 5)

# Define models
ridge_model <- linear_reg(penalty = tune(), mixture = 0) %>% set_engine("glmnet")
lasso_model <- linear_reg(penalty = tune(), mixture = 1) %>% set_engine("glmnet")
elastic_net_model <- linear_reg(penalty = tune(), mixture = tune()) %>% set_engine("glmnet")

# Create workflows
ridge_workflow <- workflow() %>% add_model(ridge_model) %>% add_formula(SalePrice ~ .)
lasso_workflow <- workflow() %>% add_model(lasso_model) %>% add_formula(SalePrice ~ .)
elastic_net_workflow <- workflow() %>% add_model(elastic_net_model) %>% add_formula(SalePrice ~ .)

# Tune models using cross-validation
ridge_tune <- tune_grid(ridge_workflow, resamples = cv_folds, grid = 50)
lasso_tune <- tune_grid(lasso_workflow, resamples = cv_folds, grid = 50)
elastic_net_tune <- tune_grid(elastic_net_workflow, resamples = cv_folds, grid = 30)

# Collect RMSE metrics for each model
ridge_rmse <- collect_metrics(ridge_tune) %>% filter(.metric == "rmse")
lasso_rmse <- collect_metrics(lasso_tune) %>% filter(.metric == "rmse")
elastic_net_rmse <- collect_metrics(elastic_net_tune) %>% filter(.metric == "rmse")

# Select best models based on RMSE
best_ridge <- select_best(ridge_tune, metric = "rmse")
best_lasso <- select_best(lasso_tune, metric = "rmse")
best_elastic_net <- select_best(elastic_net_tune, metric = "rmse")


# Finalize workflows with best hyperparameters
final_ridge_workflow <- finalize_workflow(ridge_workflow, best_ridge)
final_lasso_workflow <- finalize_workflow(lasso_workflow, best_lasso)
final_elastic_net_workflow <- finalize_workflow(elastic_net_workflow, best_elastic_net)


# Fit the models on the training data
final_ridge_fit <- fit(final_ridge_workflow, data = train_processed)
final_lasso_fit <- fit(final_lasso_workflow, data = train_processed)
final_elastic_net_fit <- fit(final_elastic_net_workflow, data = train_processed)

# Extract coefficients
lasso_coef <- tidy(final_lasso_fit)
ridge_coef <- tidy(final_ridge_fit)
elastic_net_coef <- tidy(final_elastic_net_fit)

# Print coefficients
print(lasso_coef)
print(ridge_coef)
print(elastic_net_coef)

# Extract the fitted glmnet object from the workflow and print the solution path

mfrow<-c(1,1)
lasso_glmnet <- extract_fit_parsnip(final_lasso_fit)$fit
plot(lasso_glmnet, main = "Lasso Path")

ridge_glmnet <- extract_fit_parsnip(final_ridge_fit)$fit
plot(ridge_glmnet, main = "Ridge Path")

enet_glmnet <- extract_fit_parsnip(final_elastic_net_fit)$fit
plot(enet_glmnet, main = "Elastic Net Path")

# ggplot version

library(patchwork)

autoplot(lasso_glmnet) + ggtitle("Lasso Solution Path") +
  autoplot(ridge_glmnet) + ggtitle("Ridge Solution Path") +
  autoplot(enet_glmnet) + ggtitle("Elastic Net Solution Path")



# Make predictions for the training dataset (use train_processed for RMSE calculation)
ridge_predictions <- predict(final_ridge_fit, new_data = train_processed)
lasso_predictions <- predict(final_lasso_fit, new_data = train_processed)
elastic_net_predictions <- predict(final_elastic_net_fit, new_data = train_processed)

# Combine the actual SalePrice and ridge predictions into one data frame
ridge_results <- bind_cols(train_processed, ridge_predictions)
# Calculate RMSE for Ridge
ridge_rmse_value <- rmse(ridge_results, truth = SalePrice, estimate = .pred)

# Combine the actual SalePrice and lasso predictions into one data frame
lasso_results <- bind_cols(train_processed, lasso_predictions)
# Calculate RMSE for Lasso
lasso_rmse_value <- rmse(lasso_results, truth = SalePrice, estimate = .pred)

# Combine the actual SalePrice and elastic net predictions into one data frame
elastic_net_results <- bind_cols(train_processed, elastic_net_predictions)
# Calculate RMSE for Elastic Net
elastic_net_rmse_value <- rmse(elastic_net_results, truth = SalePrice, estimate = .pred)

# Print the RMSE values
cat("Ridge RMSE:", ridge_rmse_value$.estimate, "\n")
cat("Lasso RMSE:", lasso_rmse_value$.estimate, "\n")
cat("Elastic Net RMSE:", elastic_net_rmse_value$.estimate, "\n")


# Select the best model workflow directly based on RMSE values
if (lasso_rmse_value$.estimate <= min(ridge_rmse_value$.estimate, elastic_net_rmse_value$.estimate)) {
  best_model <- final_lasso_fit
} else if (ridge_rmse_value$.estimate <= elastic_net_rmse_value$.estimate) {
  best_model <- final_ridge_fit
} else {
  best_model <- final_elastic_net_fit
}

# Extract the final fitted model from the workflow
final_model <- best_model %>% extract_fit_parsnip()

# Now you can make predictions using the final model
final_predictions <- predict(final_model, new_data = test_processed)




# Exponentiate predictions if needed (log-transformed SalePrice)
final_predictions_exp <- exp(final_predictions$.pred)

# Prepare the submission dataframe
submission_df <- data.frame(Id = realty_test$Id, SalePrice = final_predictions_exp)

# Save the submission dataframe to a CSV file
write.csv(submission_df, "final_submission.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Preview the submission dataframe
head(submission_df)


```
## Variable selection
Below code is to note down variables that were removed from lasso and/or elastic net.

```{r}
# Extract all initial variables (excluding the target variable "SalePrice")
initial_vars <- setdiff(colnames(train_processed), "SalePrice")
cat("Initial variables:\n")
print(initial_vars)
# Extract nonzero coefficient variables for Lasso
lasso_selected <- lasso_coef %>% filter(estimate != 0) %>% pull(term)
lasso_removed <- setdiff(initial_vars, lasso_selected)

# Extract nonzero coefficient variables for Elastic Net
elastic_net_selected <- elastic_net_coef %>% filter(estimate != 0) %>% pull(term)
elastic_net_removed <- setdiff(initial_vars, elastic_net_selected)

# Print results
cat("Variables removed by Lasso:\n")
print(lasso_removed)

cat("Variables removed by Elastic Net:\n")
print(elastic_net_removed)


```

## Optimal tuning parameters

```{r}

# Note down optimal tuning parameters

cat("Optimal tuning parameter for Ridge Regression:\n")
print(best_ridge)

cat("\nOptimal tuning parameter for Lasso Regression:\n")
print(best_lasso)

cat("\nOptimal tuning parameters for Elastic Net:\n")
print(best_elastic_net)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(realty2, aes(x = GrLivArea, y = SalePrice)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "SalePrice vs. GrLivArea", x = "GrLivArea", y = "SalePrice") +
  theme_minimal()

```

Below there is some exploratory data analysis to see effects of certain variables on Sale price. From these, we chose to use the spline function on GrLivArea as there is a clear non linear pattern observed. 



```{r}
ggplot(realty2, aes(x = GrLivArea, y = SalePrice)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.5, color = "blue") +
  labs(title = "SalePrice vs. GrLivArea with LOESS Smoothing", x = "GrLivArea", y = "SalePrice") +
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
ggplot(realty2, aes(x = LotArea, y = SalePrice)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.5, color = "blue") +
  labs(title = "SalePrice vs. LotArea with LOESS Smoothing", x = "LotArea", y = "SalePrice") +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
ggplot(realty2, aes(x = YearBuilt, y = SalePrice)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.5, color = "blue") +
  labs(title = "SalePrice vs. YearBuilt with LOESS Smoothing", x = "YearBuilt", y = "SalePrice") +
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
ggplot(realty2, aes(x = OverallQual, y = SalePrice)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.5, color = "blue") +
  labs(title = "SalePrice vs. OverallQual with LOESS Smoothing", x = "OverallQual", y = "SalePrice") +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
ggplot(realty2, aes(x = GarageArea, y = SalePrice)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.5, color = "blue") +
  labs(title = "SalePrice vs. GarageArea with LOESS Smoothing", x = "GarageArea", y = "SalePrice") +
  theme_minimal()

```
